instructions: Ask the maintainer before changing needs_maintainer_decision or manual_review_required tasks.
After each fix, run the task verificationCommands before rerunning the full gate.
Do not paste secrets, tokens, DSNs, or production credentials into code, prompts, or reports.

tasks.title: Compromised GitHub Action dependency
evidence: summary: Workflow uses the compromised changed-files action version with broad workflow permissions.
tasks.fixStrategy: Harden the workflow or action configuration, then rerun actionlint/zizmor and the gate.
tasks.riskNotes: Workflow uses the compromised changed-files action version with broad workflow permissions.
